holdings.infoBox: GDX is an equity ETF with a total of 56 individual holdings. The top holdings are Newmont stock at 11.40%, Agnico Eagle Mines at 11.07%, Barrick Mining at 8.60%, AngloGold Ashanti at 5.16%, and Franco-Nevada at 5.01%.

overview.description: The VanEck Gold Miners ETF (GDX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MarketVector Global Gold Miners index, a market-cap-weighted index of global companies tied to gold and silver mining activities. GDX was launched on May 22, 2006 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Enters Canada, Appoints Industry Vet Kevin Gopaul as CEO
data.text: VanEck has appointed Kevin Gopaul as CEO of VanEck Canada. According to the press release, Gopaul brings more than 25 years of industry experience to the newly created role.
